name: Duran Duran
bio: Duran Duran's catalog remains commercially durable through streaming, 1980s nostalgia, and recurring sync-friendly singles.
notable_for: Video-era pop-rock songs with long-tail replay value.
career_highlight: Their best-known singles still anchor strong long-tail catalog economics.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and nostalgia playlists keep the songs active.
Strong visual-era recognition helps sustain replay value.
Film and television usage support catalog rediscovery.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Duran Duran's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Duran Duran's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
